title: Beehiiv API keys should not be disclosed
description: Beehiiv is a newsletter and media platform. API keys provide access to subscriber lists, publication data, and email sending capabilities. Exposing keys allows unauthorized access to subscriber data and email sending.
recommendation: Remove Beehiiv API keys from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at app.beehiiv.com/settings/api.
impact: Unauthorized access to subscriber lists with PII, email sending from your publication, and audience data exposure.

checks.message: Beehiiv API key detected (pub_ prefix). Beehiiv API keys provide access to newsletter subscriber data, publication management, and email sending capabilities. Exposing this key allows reading all subscriber information including email addresses and subscription data, sending unauthorized emails to your subscriber list, managing newsletter content, and accessing publication analytics. Rotate immediately at app.beehiiv.com/settings/api.
Beehiiv API key detected in variable assignment. Beehiiv keys control newsletter subscriber data and email sending. Rotate immediately.
